title: Fix debaters rebutting themselves in round 2

log.context: Fix debaters rebutting themselves in round 2

Done. Here's a summary of what changed in `/mnt/data/temporal-workflows/activities/congress_act.py`:

**The bug:** In the `congress_debate` activity's Round 2 path, all thread messages were collected into context without filtering. Since each debater's Round 1 post is in the thread formatted as `**Display Name**: <text>`, the debater would see their own post and respond to it.

**The fix — two parts:**
